锤亚当要在后面，书不会断更，随便养，没人也不怕，为了丽贝卡酱，冲！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754927641,"group_id":"7522859420166933528","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"准备好了吗，船长。我…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyAT/CVpufcCMpviTQMdv0nfjR/V0QC1KVn3mHnjjQdZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/735fda1fe2d34938a6f78e56d78f3ef7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623206&x-signature=J%2BpMaEjHn3PyVZ%2Flbem0cN1%2Fru4%3D","user_id":"1385000136350888","user_name":"发霉的包子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1385000136350888","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7522859420166933528","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：金刚·大卫背着药片·露西砍亚当之昔拉扛着武器果实·丽贝卡打摩根……
【边缘行者or2077or往日之影】
战斗！以及反抗世界的革命！！致敬我最最亲爱的丽贝卡酱！！！】
“夜之城没有活着的传奇。”
“年轻人，你凭什么觉得你不一样？”
“我？”
“每个人刚走上这条路，都觉得他挺独特。”
“不过..我的身体告诉我..还要更多……”
“或许以后见到‘他’。”
“我会举起锤子问他！”
“亚当重锤。”
“你的锤子呢？”
…
“朋友。”
“你是愿意当个无名之辈一辈子默默无闻，只能在阴暗潮湿的角落里插着管子等死。”
“还是即便活不了三十岁，也要名流青史。”
“朋友们！我宣战！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o15880d75755babb8c7abf376fb84c02f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"发霉的包子","author_id":"","book_id":"7522859420166933528","book_name":"赛博，斯安威斯坦，砍翻夜之城","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7523018483719029272","read_count":"125","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"214270"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"93","tags":"科幻末世,赛博朋克","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o15880d75755babb8c7abf376fb84c02f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779289127&x-signature=B1kLJxA5VzG1Wy6Mk74h6GClP8g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1385000136350888","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"128"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212258475C5F4C9F9D95EACD604C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":964,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":417},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7522859420166933528","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"ho
